_instructions: Copy this file to {disease_key}.json. Fill in all REPLACE fields. Upload to S3 config bucket to activate monitoring for this disease.

detection.notes: REPLACE: What % of ED visits indicates an outbreak is beginning?

_data_sources_notes: cdc_wastewater: Check https://data.cdc.gov — search for 'wastewater' + your disease name
cdc_nssp: The pathogen_name must exactly match the 'pathogen' field in dataset rdmq-nq56
Set any unavailable source to null — the system will skip it gracefully

seasonality.notes: REPLACE: When does this disease typically peak? Use null for non-seasonal diseases.

prediction.notes: REPLACE: How many weeks warning does this disease typically provide? How does severity propagate?

_prediction_notes: You need at least 2 complete seasons of historical data to calibrate predictions.
Run scripts/seed_calibration_data.py after adding a new disease to backfill DynamoDB.
If the disease doesn't follow metro→rural geographic propagation, this system may not be appropriate.

preparation_focus: REPLACE with 3-5 preparation actions specific to this disease
contraindications: REPLACE with things the AI should NEVER recommend
prompt_hints.seasonal_context: REPLACE with helpful context for alert generation
